content:
Write a single self-contained HTML file at ./architecture.html that diagrams a 3-tier
system: a Client box connected to an API box, connected to a Database box. Label the boxes
exactly "Client", "API", and "Database", and draw the connections with inline <svg> (lines
or arrows) — no external stylesheets, scripts, or CDN links.

message.content:
Write a single self-contained HTML file at ./architecture.html that diagrams a 3-tier
system: a Client box connected to an API box, connected to a Database box. Label the boxes
exactly "Client", "API", and "Database", and draw the connections with inline <svg> (lines
or arrows) — no external stylesheets, scripts, or CDN links.

input.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>3-Tier Architecture Diagram</title>
    <style>
        body {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            background-color: #f5f5f5;
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        }
        svg {
            background-color: white;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <svg width="800" height="300" viewBox="0 0 800 300">
        <!-- Client Box -->
        <rect x="50" y="100" width="150" height="100" fill="#e8f4f8" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/>
        <text x="125" y="155" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#2c3e50">Client</text>

        <!-- API Box -->
        <rect x="325" y="100" width="150" height="100" fill="#fff4e6" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/>
        <text x="400" y="155" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#2c3e50">API</text>

        <!-- Database Box -->
        <rect x="600" y="100" width="150" height="100" fill="#f0e6ff" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/>
        <text x="675" y="155" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#2c3e50">Database</text>

        <!-- Arrow from Client to API -->
        <line x1="200" y1="150" x2="325" y2="150" stroke="#34495e" stroke-width="2"/>
        <polygon points="325,150 315,145 318,150 315,155" fill="#34495e"/>

        <!-- Arrow from API to Database -->
        <line x1="475" y1="150" x2="600" y2="150" stroke="#34495e" stroke-width="2"/>
        <polygon points="600,150 590,145 593,150 590,155" fill="#34495e"/>
    </svg>
</body>
</html>

content.content: File created successfully at: ./architecture.html (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>3-Tier Architecture Diagram</title>
    <style>
        body {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;

            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <svg width="800" height="300" viewBox="0 0 800 300">
        <!-- Client Box -->
        <rect x="50" y="100" width="150" height="100" fill="#e8f4f8" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/>
        <text x="125" y="155" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#2c3e50">Client</text>

        <!-- API Box -->
        <rect x="325" y="100" width="150" height="100" fill="#fff4e6" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/>
        <text x="400" y="155" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#2c3e50">API</text>

        <!-- Database Box -->
        <rect x="600" y="100" width="150" height="100" fill="#f0e6ff" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/>
        <text x="675" y="155" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#2c3e50">Database</text>

        <!-- Arrow from Client to API -->
        <line x1="200" y1="150" x2="325" y2="150" stroke="#34495e" stroke-width="2"/>
        <polygon points="325,150 315,145 318,150 315,155" fill="#34495e"/>

        <!-- Arrow from API to Database -->
        <line x1="475" y1="150" x2="600" y2="150" stroke="#34495e" stroke-width="2"/>

</html>

content.text:
Done! I've created `./architecture.html` with a 3-tier architecture diagram. It includes:

- Three labeled boxes: "Client", "API", and "Database"
- Arrows connecting them left-to-right using inline SVG
- All styling and graphics self-contained (no external resources)
- Clean centered layout with a white background

You can open it in any browser to view the diagram.

lastPrompt: Write a single self-contained HTML file at ./architecture.html that diagrams a 3-tier system: a Client box connected to an API box, connected to a Database box. Label the boxes exactly "Client", "API"…
